title: Super Mario Odyssey
edition_pinned: Nintendo Switch launch edition, October 2017, as pinned by the Tier-1 card.
moat: Capture converts enemies and objects into temporary move-sets that open moons the base kit cannot reach.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: Temporary capture kits let one movement system borrow many local verbs without a permanent ability tree.
exemplar_rationale: Demonstrates authored discovery through temporary embodiment and surplus objective routing.

evidence.claim: Nintendo's product genre record listed: Action; Adventure.
